description: Account Service Dead Code & Minor Fixes. (1) calculateAccountHealth() unreachable from router — decide: wire (D-02). (2) getAccountWithContext() unreachable from router — decide: wire (D-03). (3) Revenue NaN risk — Number(revenue) on non-numeric string renders '$NaNM' (F-14). (4) Health bar arbitrary scale — no documented max value (F-15). (5) Contact firstName[0] undefined risk in AccountContactsList (F-18). (6) findAncestors N+1 query pattern (B-14). (7) Merge/Archive toast stubs referencing IFC-044 (F-03/F-04). Audit: docs/audit/account-detail-wiring-audit.md sections 9, 13, 16-17.

wiring_complete.target: Zero dead code methods; zero NaN renders; hierarchy query O(1)

notes: Account domain wiring audit finding. See docs/audit/account-detail-wiring-audit.md.
